id: control-operation
title: "Control Operation"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Control Operation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/control_operation"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This command controls device functionality, including RFID operations and scan operations.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","enum":["control_operation"],"description":"Specifies the name of the command to be executed. In this case, it is control_operation."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request. This ensures traceability and prevents duplicate processing of the same request."},"ctrlOprPayload":{"title":"ctrlOprPayload","x-stoplight":{"id":"p5pvffwkuqqm1"},"type":"object","properties":{"controlType":{"type":"string","description":"Specifies whether the control is for RFID or Scanner operations.","enum":["RFID","SCANNER"],"example":"RFID"},"operation":{"type":"string","description":"Indicates the operation to be performed such as start or stop the inventory.","enum":["START","STOP"]}},"required":["controlType","operation"]}}},"examples":{"Start inventory":{"description":"Payload to start inventory","value":{"command":"control_operation","requestId":"abcd1432","ctrlOprPayload":{"controlType":"RFID","operation":"START"}}},"Stop inventory":{"description":"Payload to stop inventory","value":{"command":"control_operation","requestId":"abcd1432","ctrlOprPayload":{"controlType":"RFID","operation":"STOP"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"control_operation response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"control_operation","description":"The type of command being executed or responded to. For MQTT, this specifies the operation type."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, used for tracking the request and its corresponding response in the MQTT protocol."},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"],"example":"V1.1","description":"The version of the API being used in this MQTT response message."},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion","response"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"control_operation","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
